features.title: Add repo-aware Modal helper defaults
features.description: Update the Python helper to support mounting the repo, stable app naming, and explicit resource flags.

features.title: Add a one-command sandbox wrapper
features.description: Introduce a shell wrapper that mounts the repository into /workspace and forwards extra Modal options.

features.title: Refresh docs and validate the workflow
features.description: Document the new preferred commands, keep the exec-plan state aligned, and run the repo checks.
